summary.intent: Refactor gossamer from an Electron desktop app into a VS Code extension to reduce install friction and improve context-switching, then progressively add features: sessions view, session detail with checkpoints, native diff, search, MCP server, multi-agent support, image rendering, and local VSIX packaging.
summary.outcome: Successfully delivered a fully functional VS Code extension with sessions list, session detail tabs, native checkpoint tree with diff/rewind/summary, QuickPick search with FTS, embedded MCP server at /mcp, per-agent CLI commands, base64 image rendering, custom title display, and a packaging script producing a local gossamer.vsix.

repo: Each repo gets its own SQLite database; the registry is ~/.gossamer/config.json with a repos[] array, each entry having localPath and dbPath
The gossamer server runs from gossamer-testing/dist/serve.js (the git worktree), NOT from gossamer/dist/serve.js — any rebuild must happen in the worktree
Custom session titles (/rename) produce custom-title events stored ONLY in ~/.claude/projects/<encoded-path>/*.jsonl, not in shadow or checkpoint branches
Session color chosen in Claude Code is not persisted to disk anywhere — cannot be read by gossamer
Entire.io writes session data to a git branch (entire/checkpoints/v1); gossamer reads that branch and indexes into SQLite; shadow branch captures live events
The agent name is stored in CheckpointSessionMetadata.agent (e.g. 'Claude Code', 'Gemini CLI')
slug on LogEvent is auto-generated and never changes on /rename; custom-title events are the actual rename signal
findRepo() uses exact-match; sessions whose cwd is a subdirectory of the repo root require prefix-matching via findRepoForPath()
Images are stored as base64 in full.jsonl files on the entire/checkpoints/v1 branch but the schema originally had no image fields — required schema migration + backfill from LogEvent.data JSON column

code.finding: Was only listing extension.ts and GossamerPanel.ts in include — SessionDetailPanel.ts and diffUtils.ts were never compiled, causing blank diff views at runtime. Fixed to include: ['src/**/*.ts'], exclude: ['src/webview']

process.execPath points to VS Code's bundled Electron Node.js, not system node. Must use execFileSync('which', ['node']) to get system node for spawning the gossamer server to avoid native module version mismatch (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 140 vs 141)
acquireVsCodeApi() can only be called once per webview lifetime. Stored as window.__vscodeApi in the host page inline script; React module checks for it before calling acquireVsCodeApi()

onDidChangeViewState must call checkpointProvider.setSession() when e.webviewPanel.active — without this, the checkpoint sidebar only updates when new tabs are created, not when switching between existing ones
root: 'src/webview' is a relative path resolved relative to CWD (repo root when run via workspace), not the package directory. Must use root: resolve(__dirname, 'src/webview') with absolute path

The file watcher approach requires watching both .db and .db-wal files for SQLite WAL mode, plus a parent directory watcher for file creation events. Debounce at 50ms. For git refs, watch .git/ non-recursively for packed-refs and .git/refs/ recursively. Keep 30s fallback polls for reliability
Panel webview HTML must have type='module' on the script tag when Vite outputs ESM, and img-src data: https: http: in CSP for base64 image rendering

Adding nullable columns to SQLite via prisma db push triggers --accept-data-loss warning even though it's safe. For tables with FTS virtual tables (like LogContent FTS), use direct ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN instead

workflow: Edit source in gossamer/, manually cp changed files to gossamer-testing/, then npm run build -w packages/vscode in gossamer-testing. This is the required pattern since worktrees have separate file copies
The gossamer server is a static singleton in GossamerPanel — it survives panel disposal. Use 'Gossamer: Restart Server' command to pick up rebuilt server code, not panel close/reopen
When the server is running from a different worktree than where code is being edited, always verify which dist/serve.js is actually running (ps aux | grep serve)
VS Code auxiliary windows (tabs popped out) reload the webview from scratch — must handle onDidChangeViewState to re-send server_ready after a window move
Chord keybindings (Ctrl+K G) don't fire when the webview has focus since the webview captures keyboard input

For VS Code content providers, URI scheme approach (gossamer-diff:) can have encoding fragility issues with path separators. Temp files with real file URIs are more reliable but in-memory TextDocumentContentProvider avoids disk writes
vsce package requires a publisher field in package.json — use --no-dependencies flag to avoid bundling node_modules into the VSIX when using esbuild bundling instead

friction: Native module version mismatch (better-sqlite3 compiled for system Node MODULE_VERSION 141 vs VS Code Electron Node 140) required spawning server as child process using system node instead of importing Prisma directly in extension host
gossamer-testing worktree requires manual file syncing every time source changes — no watch/sync automation, easy to forget and test stale code
Server running stale code was a repeated blocker — had to kill process and restart manually since static server singleton doesn't auto-restart on file changes
tsconfig.extension.json only compiled 2 files, silently skipping SessionDetailPanel.ts and diffUtils.ts — caused blank diff view with no error message
Accidentally modified Electron app files (app/src/main/index.ts, preload, Shell.tsx) when implementing 'minimizable' feature — had to revert everything after user correction
Custom session titles require reading ~/.claude/projects/ JSONL files directly since custom-title events are not written to checkpoint or shadow branches
acquireVsCodeApi() called twice (once in inline script, once in React module) — caused runtime error, required window.__vscodeApi singleton pattern
Stray ~/.gossamer/gossamer.db created during schema push testing instead of pushing to the correct per-project databases
Images in DB had null imageData because rows were indexed before schema migration — required backfill from LogEvent.data JSON column
Vite output filenames were non-deterministic (index-DvZdMzP5.js) until entryFileNames/assetFileNames were configured for deterministic names
npm run build -w packages/vscode failed because workspace name is gossamer-vscode not vscode
Ctrl+K G chord keybinding doesn't work when webview has focus — panel toggle cannot be triggered from within the webview
open_items: Toggle panel keybinding (Ctrl+K G) doesn't fire when webview has focus — needs an alternative trigger mechanism from within the webview itself
Session rename with /rename may not appear if the user renames and immediately closes without any subsequent events — inherent to shadow branch polling architecture
Session color chosen in Claude Code UI is not available (not persisted to disk) — cannot be shown in gossamer
gossamer-testing worktree sync is manual — consider a watch script or symlinks to avoid stale file issues
The bundled-server/serve.js in the VSIX needs to be regenerated each time server code changes — the packaging script should ideally be part of CI
The Electron app (app/) was temporarily broken during refactor — user approved this but it has never been fixed or formally deprecated
MCP server stdio wrapper (dist/mcp.js) still exists but the primary interface is the embedded /mcp HTTP endpoint — the stdio wrapper could be removed or documented as a fallback only
CLAUDE.md was written but not added to git staging — may not have been committed
The gossamer-testing worktree is on branch 'testing' branched from 'mcp' — periodic merges from mcp to testing needed to keep dev environment current
CheckpointTreeProvider resourceUri uses absolute paths from session cwd, but for repos not matching any configured repo path the fallback may be wrong
